# llms.txt — Foshan Xiangfa Shun Plastic Co., Ltd.

> This is a structured site description for AI / LLM / search engines.
> It contains basic information about our products, business, and contact info,
> so AI summaries and answers can accurately reference us.
> Full spec: https://llms.txt/

## Site Info

- Name: Foshan Xiangfa Shun Plastic Co., Ltd. (Xiangfa Shun Plastic / Xiangfa Shun)
- Domain: https://xfspvc.com/en/
- Business: PVC wire & cable compound manufacturer (in-house formulation, own factory)
- Type: LocalBusiness / Manufacturer
- Address: Sanshui District, Foshan, Guangdong, China
- Service area: All China, export available
- Languages: Chinese (default), English

## Contact

- Tel / WeChat: 13450853338 (phone and WeChat same number)
- Phone format: +86-13450853338
- Business hours: Mon - Sat 8:00 - 18:00 (China time, GMT+8)
- Social: Search "Xiangfa Shun Plastic" on Xiaohongshu / Douyin
- Online form: None — please reach us via phone / WeChat / SMS / social media

## Main Products (PVC Wire & Cable Compound)

| Category | Chinese | English | Typical Application |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| PVC Insulation | 70℃ 绝缘料 | 70℃ Insulation Compound | BV / BVR building wire insulation, electronic wire conductor |
| PVC Sheath | 护套料 | Sheath Compound | RVV / RVVP / power cord outer sheath |
| Electronic Wire | 电子料 | Electronic Wire Compound | USB / DC / signal cable jacket |
| Power Plug | 插头料 | Plug Compound | Power plug, socket housing (injection) |
| Heat-resistant | 105℃ 耐高温料 | 105℃ Heat-resistant Compound | Appliance internal wiring, transformer leads |
| Cold-resistant | -40℃ 耐寒料 | -40℃ Cold-resistant Compound | Northern outdoor cable, agricultural machinery cable |
| Transparent | 高透明料 | High-transparent Compound | Transparent power cord, LED strip |
| Appearance | 雾面料 | Frosted / Matte Compound | Premium power cord, decorative wires |
| Modified | 改性橡塑料 | Modified Compound | Customer special performance customization |

## Manufacturing

- Formulation → Raw material mixing → Extrusion & pelletizing → Cooling & screening → Packaging & delivery → Batch stability
- In-house formulation R&D, customizable per customer sample / drawing / performance spec
- Each batch retained for record — long-term customers get consistent formulation & stability
- Small-batch trial supported; factory visit and sample viewing welcome

## Industry Knowledge (FAQ)

- PVC wire & cable compound selection (scenario / temperature / flame retardant / processing)
- 70℃ / 90℃ / 105℃ temperature rating differences
- -40℃ cold-resistant vs standard PVC
- ROHS / REACH / NP environmental standards
- MOQ, sample cycle, color customization, batch color shift, packaging spec, shelf life
- Factory-direct vs trader vs finished-compound maker differences

## Inquiry Communication Tips

We recommend providing: usage scenario, wire spec, key performance requirements, applicable standard, estimated monthly volume, processing method, other special requirements (odor, anti-yellowing, export certifications, etc.).

## Site Structure

Chinese (default, no prefix):
- / Home — factory positioning, products, advantages, inquiry entry
- /products/ Product catalog — 9 categories with detailed specs
- /manufacturing/ Manufacturing — process, equipment, batch stability
- /knowledge/ Knowledge — selection guide + FAQ
- /contact/ Contact — phone / WeChat / Xiaohongshu / Douyin / QR / address / inquiry list

English:
- /en/ Home — factory positioning, products, advantages, inquiry entry
- /en/products/ Product catalog — 9 categories with detailed specs
- /en/manufacturing/ Manufacturing — process, equipment, batch stability
- /en/knowledge/ Knowledge — selection guide + FAQ
- /en/contact/ Contact — phone / WeChat / Xiaohongshu / Douyin / QR / address / inquiry list

## SEO / GEO Notes

- Primary domain: https://xfspvc.com/
- robots.txt: https://xfspvc.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://xfspvc.com/sitemap.xml (zh + en + hreflang)
- Chinese llms.txt: https://xfspvc.com/llms.txt
- English llms.txt: https://xfspvc.com/en/llms.txt
- Each core page has title / description / canonical
- Chinese ↔ English pages point to each other via hreflang
- Key pages have JSON-LD structured data: Organization, LocalBusiness, ItemList (Product), FAQPage, ContactPage
